description: Filter molecules by a molecular-complexity percentile threshold against precomputed ZINC-15 distributions, writing a passes_complexity_<metric> boolean column (True = below the percentile threshold).
rules: read-only — parses molecules and writes a results CSV; mutates nothing remote
INPUT may be .csv/.tsv (smiles column), .sdf, or .txt (one SMILES per line)
COMPLEXITY is the percentile limit (e.g. 99 keeps molecules below the 99th ZINC-15 percentile)
COMPLEXITY_METHOD is one of: bertz, sas, qed, clogp, whitlock, barone, smcm, twc
usage: Set INPUT (molecule file), COMPLEXITY (percentile e.g. 99), COMPLEXITY_METHOD (metric). Output: complexity.csv.
limitation: Requires the medchem + datamol + rdkit + pandas stack (Python >=3.9); when absent the porter degrades gracefully and writes a stub so governance still runs offline.
